resources.string: Used to control access to Universal ReVanced Manager plugins. Only Universal ReVanced Manager has this.
New downloader plugins available. Click here to configure them.
Patching on this device architecture is unsupported and will most likely fail.
Patches could not be loaded. Click to view the error
Patches has not been downloaded. Click here to download it
The app installation permission must be granted ahead of time to avoid a bug in the Android 11 system that will negatively affect the user experience.
Use all available downloaders to download the app
Select an APK from local storage
Mounted apps cannot be patched again without root access
Version %s does not match the suggested version
Pick which bundle’s suggestion should be used when downloading an APK.
Automatically pick the most common compatible version.
Redownload %1$s and overwrite the local copy?
Check this bundle for updates in the background
Drag the handle to arrange the order bundles appear in the list and the patch selection menu.
Add a patch bundle to organize it.
Drag the handle to arrange the order apps appear in the list.
Add a patched app to organize it.
Drag the handle to arrange the order patch profiles appear in the list.
Create a patch profile to organize it.
A patch bundle with this name already exists
Could not update this patch bundle.
Release page is not available for this bundle
Go to Settings > Advanced > Safeguards and set both \"Require suggested app version\" (toggle off) and \"Disable version compatibility check\" (toggle on) to choose bundle-specific versions.

ReVanced (.rvp), Ample (.rvp), and Morphe (.mpp) patches cannot be combined. Select patches from only one bundle type. If you want to use multiple, you will have to patch a second time using the other patches you want.
Your device is not connected to the internet. Downloading will fail later.
You are currently on a metered connection. Data charges from your service provider may apply.
Do you want Universal ReVanced Manager to periodically check for updates for the following components?
These settings can be changed later.

Controls the patcher and bundle update notifications. When enabled, bundle updates download in the background. If notifications are allowed, you will see progress and completion updates along with the patching in progress notification.
Enable notifications so the manager can alert you when patch bundle updates are available.
Shows progress for background patch bundle updates.
Check for updates and view changelog

A downloader is a plugin which allows URV to download stock APKs from various sources. The downloaded APKs will be shown in the bottom section. During the patching process, you can choose an already downloaded APKs or you can download it via a plugin.\n\nThe list of supported downloader plugins can be found
Check out the latest changes in this update
Choose a custom accent color for the app
Use pure black for system dark theme
When following system theme, use the pure black palette for dark mode
Tap a color to apply it instantly
Tint surfaces and backgrounds with your own color
Updates instantly when changing theme settings
Pick how the app follows system, light, dark, Material You, or pure black
Set a background image for the app. Supported types: JPEG, PNG, GIF, SVG, TIFF, WebP.
Adjust how transparent the custom background image appears.
Disable the custom background image and return to the default background.
Hide the text labels under the Apps, Patch Bundles, Patch Profiles, and Tools tab icons on the main screen.
Hide the Patch Profiles tab on the main screen and disable the Save profile action in patch selection.
Hide the Tools tab on the main screen.
Do not restrict patches to compatible app versions
Selecting incompatible patches can result in a broken app.\n\nDo you want to proceed anyways?
Enforce selection of the suggested app version
Selecting an app that is not the suggested version may cause unexpected issues.\n\nDo you want to proceed anyways?
Allow changing patch selection and options
Do not prevent selecting or deselecting patches and customization of options
Changing the selection of patches may cause unexpected issues.\n\nEnable anyways?
Do not hide universal patches or prevent usage of them
This patch profile contains universal patches. Enable “%1$s” in advanced settings to use it.
This app contains universal patches. Enable “%1$s” in advanced settings to continue.
Import a custom keystore of the following types: JKS, PKCS12 (.p12 or .pfx) and BKS.
Enter the keystore password and key password. If the key password is the same, you can leave it empty.
You are about to regenerate your keystore the manager will use during the patching process.\n\nYou will not be able to update the previously installed apps from this source.
The keystore has been successfully replaced
Your keystore is missing. Regenerate or import one in Settings > Import & Export before signing.
Import patch selection from a JSON file
Import selections for a single bundle from a JSON file
Import selections for all bundles from a JSON file
Restore remote patch bundles from a JSON file
No new patch bundles were imported
Import saved patch profiles from a JSON file
Restore saved manager settings from a JSON file
Import patch selections, patch bundles, patch profiles, and manager settings from a single JSON file
Export patch selection to a JSON file
Exports selections for all apps in the chosen bundle.
Exports the selections for all patch bundles to a single file.
Save imported remote patch bundles to a JSON file
Exported %1$d patch bundles. Some bundles could not be exported because they were added locally.
Export all patch profiles to a JSON file
There are no patch profiles to export
Save all manager settings to a JSON file
Export patch selections, patch bundles, patch profiles, and manager settings to one JSON file (keystore is not included)
All action buttons are hidden, enable at least one in settings
Skip confirmation dialogs for patch selection actions
Disabling confirmations may cause unintended bulk changes.
Display a summary of selected patches by bundle before starting the patcher
Automatically hide the patch selection action buttons whenever you select or deselect a patch
Choose the layout order for the patch selection action buttons
Choose the layout order for the patch bundle action buttons
Choose which patch bundle action buttons are shown
Choose the layout order for the saved app action buttons
Choose which saved app action buttons are shown
Show version tags on patches in the selection screen
Choose which patch selection action buttons are shown
Some actions are forced hidden by other settings.
Forced hidden because Patch Profiles is hidden in General settings.
This clears every selected patch across all bundles.
This restores the recommended defaults for %1$s.
This selects every patch across all bundles.

You are about to reset all patch selections. You will need to manually select each patch again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
This will restore your patch selections and options to their recommended defaults.

You are about to reset the patch selection for the app \"%s\". You will have to manually select each patch again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
Resets patch selection for a single app

You are about to reset the patch selection for \"%s\". You will have to manually select each patch again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
Resets the patch selection for a specific collection of patches

You are about to reset the patch options for the app \"%s\". You will have to reapply each option again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
Resets patch options for a single app

You are about to reset the patch options for \"%s\". You will have to reapply each option again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
Resets the patch options for a specific collection of patches

You are about to reset all patch options. You will have to reapply each option again.
Patch profiles are not affected.
Keep APKs downloaded through plugins for reuse. Disable to delete them after patching.
Failed to load. Click for more details
Continuing will allow this plugin to run on your system.\n\nOnly enable this plugin if you trust it. Plugins can execute arbitrary code and may compromise your device.
Failed to load \"%1$s\". You can view the error details or uninstall the plugin.
Are you sure you want to uninstall \"%1$s\"?
A file named %1$s already exists. Replace it?
Select an APK file from storage using file picker
This is faster and allows Patcher to use more memory
Remove all native libraries except a single supported CPU architecture from patched apps
Skip split APK modules that don’t match this device (e.g. language or density)
The max amount of memory that the Patcher process can use (in megabytes)
Use the highest memory limit allowed by your device for the experimental patcher
Automatically collapse each patcher progress widget after all of its steps finish
Automatically expand a patcher progress widget when it starts running

When enabled, the manager saves a patched app entry and APK so it stays in the Apps tab and can be reinstalled later. Turning this off skips saving and deletes all saved patched apps. Any apps installed through the Rooted mount installer remain visible
Always create a new saved app entry
Prevent saved patched app entries from being overwritten. When enabled, every new saved patched app creates a separate Apps tab entry.
Use the in-app custom file picker. Turn this off to use the Android Documents Provider instead.
Restore pre-installed Official ReVanced patch bundle
Reinstall the pre-installed Official ReVanced patches bundle
The pre-installed Official ReVanced patches bundle is currently installed
Failed to restore the Official ReVanced patch bundle: %1$s
The Official ReVanced patch bundle is already installed
Customize the default filename for exported patched apps
Use the placeholders below to build a filename. The .apk extension is added automatically if missing.
Replaced with the app\'s display name.
Replaced with the app\'s package name.
Replaced with the app\'s version name.
Replaced with the applied patch bundle version(s).
Replaced with the applied patch bundle name(s).
The API used to download necessary files
Change the API URL of Universal ReVanced Manager. Universal ReVanced Manager uses the API to download patches and updates.
Universal ReVanced Manager connects to the API to download patches and updates. Make sure that you trust it.
GitHub Personal Access Token needed for GitHub integration
Set a GitHub Personal Access Token in order to be able to add Pull Requests as external sources. Create a PAT with scope public_repo
Adds this PAT to exported manager settings
Do not share your PAT. If you include it in a settings export, keep that file private because it contains the token.
No patch can be found. Check your patches
Create adaptive icon and header asset packs with manual image transforms.
Select images, adjust zoom and placement, then generate a ZIP package with all required DPI variants.
Drag in the color wheel to set hue/saturation, then adjust brightness.
Inner guide ring: safest centered area.
Outer guide ring: may be clipped on some launchers.
Output includes mdpi, hdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, and xxxhdpi PNGs for icon and header assets.
Select adaptive foreground, light header, and dark header images first.
Select an adaptive foreground image first.
Select both light and dark header images first.
Unable to load the selected image. Choose a supported image file.
Adaptive foreground and background file names must be different.
Light and dark header file names must be different.
Merge split APK archives (.xapk, .apkm, .apks, .zip) into a single installable APK.
Create a new keystore with your own alias, passwords, and output format.
Generate a new signing keystore, then save it using your selected file picker mode.
Convert a keystore file between supported formats (BKS, JKS, PKCS12).
Select a keystore, enter credentials, choose a target format, then save the converted file.
Alias is optional. Leave blank to auto-detect.
Select a split APK archive to start merging. Choose where to save it after merge completes.
Pick a split archive from your device storage.
Launch a downloader plugin and select an app archive to merge.
Pick a plugin below. Package name and version are optional plugin query fields.
Selected split archive no longer exists.
Selected file is not a supported split archive (.xapk, .apkm, .apks, .zip).
No merged APK is available to save yet.
Merge process was killed, retrying merge…
Split merge process was killed by the system (exit code 137), likely due to low memory. Close background apps and try again.
Are you sure you want to stop the split merge process?
Remove the selected apps from the manager? Installed apps on your device will stay untouched.
Patch selection and options has been reset to recommended defaults

The version of the app you have selected does not match the suggested version.
Please use the suggested version: %s

To continue anyway, disable "Require suggested app version" in the advanced settings.

This app version does not match package-specific suggested versions.
Only universal patches are currently compatible.

Continue anyway and use universal patches?

It is recommended to use the default patch selection and options. Changing them may result in unexpected issues.\n\nYou need to turn on \"Allow changing patch selection and options\" in the advanced settings before toggling patches.
Choose the patch bundles to include in this profile.
No patch bundles are available to save.
Enter a name for this patch profile or select one below to update it
Tap a saved profile to overwrite it, or leave everything unselected to create a new profile.
Patch profile \"%1$s\" already exists for this app
APK package does not match this profile
When enabled and an APK is saved, tapping this profile starts patching instead of opening patch selection.
Set a specific app version to store with this profile, or target all versions.
Current version: %1$s\nIncoming version: %2$s\nWhich should be saved to this profile?
Save a configuration from the patch selection screen to see it here.
Some bundles in this profile are not available and will be skipped.
Some patches or options in this profile no longer match the bundle and were skipped.
No bundles in this profile are available. Update your bundles and try again.
Could not open this patch profile.
No local patch bundle found with UID %1$d.
Choose a remote patch bundle to replace the unavailable one.
%1$s does not contain the required patches. It was not applied. Select a different bundle.
Failed to update the profile bundle.
Choose a patch bundle to replace the missing one.
%1$s does not contain the required patches. It was not applied. Select a different bundle.
Failed to update the saved app bundle.
Show a developer-only override button when a patch profile bundle is incompatible.
The patcher ran out of memory
The experimental patcher process stopped because it ran out of memory. We lowered its memory limit from %1$d MB to %2$d MB so you can try again immediately.

The experimental patcher process stopped because it ran out of memory, but the memory limit is already at %1$d MB. Try lowering it further in Advanced settings or disable the experimental mode before retrying.
The following patches aren’t available in the current bundle: %1$s You can remove them automatically, adjust the selection, or continue anyway.
These patches need to be reselected: %1$s Enable them again (or pick alternatives) and then try patching once more.
This patch is not compatible with the selected app version (%1$s).\n\nIt is only compatible with the following version(s): %2$s.
Review the selected patches before continuing.
No patches recorded for this app
Bundle metadata unavailable. Showing saved patch names.
No patch bundles recorded for this app
Do you want to unmount the app?
Are you sure you want to unpatch this app?
Downloader did not find the app
There are downloader(s) installed but none are trusted. Check your settings.
Mounts the patched APK over the installed app (root required).
Install silently using Shizuku or Sui.
Install Shizuku or Sui to use this option.
Start Shizuku or Sui and try again.
Grant Shizuku permission to Universal ReVanced Manager from the Shizuku app.
Your primary installer is set to the rooted mount installer. This saved app was not installed using mount.
Your primary installer is set to the rooted mount installer. This saved app was not installed using mount.
Your primary installer is set to the rooted mount installer. This saved app was not installed using mount.
This app was installed using the rooted mount installer. Switch your primary installer back to use mount actions, then mount.
This app was installed using the rooted mount installer. Switch your primary installer back to use mount actions, then remount.
This app was installed using the rooted mount installer. Switch your primary installer back to use mount actions, then unmount.
The installed Shizuku version is not supported.
Unable to open Shizuku. Launch it manually and try again.
Installers manually added by the user to the Primary & Fallback installer selection menus.
Installers automatically detected and added to the Primary & Fallback installer selection menus.
Save third-party installer activities for use as primary or fallback installers
Type a package name and tap \"Find installers\" to discover installer activities
Could not remove the installer. Try again.
The installation failed. Try again or switch to a different installer.
The installation was blocked by Android. Check Play Protect or security settings.
Another app with this package name is already installed. Uninstall it before continuing.
Android reported an installation conflict. This can be caused by signature mismatch, package state, or installer restrictions.
The APK version is lower than the installed app version. Android blocks downgrades by default.
The APK is not compatible with this device or Android version.
The APK is invalid or corrupted.
There is not enough storage space for the installation.
The installation timed out. Try again.
%1$s did not confirm the installation. Check the other app and try again.
%1$s finished without installing the app. Check the installer for an error message and try again.
Rooted mount installer does not support split APKs. Use system installer instead.
Installation did not finish. Check the system installer dialog and try again.
This will remove the saved app entry and its stored APK.
This will remove the saved app entry and its saved APK. The app will remain installed.
Install the app before opening it.
This removes the installed version only. Your saved APK stays intact.
Choose how you want to share or save the patch log.
Copy the full patch log so you can paste it anywhere.
Save the patch log to storage using the custom file picker.
User interaction is required in order to proceed with this plugin.
Tap to return to the patcher
Shows progress while patching an app.
Are you sure you want to stop the patching process?
Installation is in progress. Please wait
Mount is in progress. Please wait
You are about to leave the patcher. The patched app will be lost unless you save it for later.
Keeps the patched APK accessible from the Apps tab for future installation.
Discards the patched APK and returns you to the previous screen.
Change the domain used for version search links. Example: google.com or duckduckgo.com
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"?
Are you sure you want to delete the selected patch bundles?

The Universal ReVanced Manager (URV Manager) is a fork of the Official ReVanced Manager. Both applications use the ReVanced Patcher which allows you to download and patch apps with custom patches and manage the patching process. The unique features included in the Universal ReVanced Manager are patch bundle display names, support for importing any third party patch bundles, and much more. See a full list of unique features the Universal ReVanced Manager has to offer
Allow patch and manager updates over metered networks
Check for new versions of Universal ReVanced Manager when the application starts
Use pre-release versions of Universal ReVanced Manager
Battery optimizations must be turned off in order for Universal ReVanced Manager to work correctly in the background. Click here to turn off optimizations.
To receive background bundle update notifications reliably, disable battery optimization for URV Manager.
Show the battery optimization warning banner on the dashboard.
Disabling this warning can make it harder to notice background restrictions. Only hide it if you understand the risk.
A new version of Universal ReVanced Manager (%s) is available.
You are currently on a metered connection, and data charges from your service provider may apply.\n\nDo you still want to continue?
Add new patch bundles from URL or local files
Add patch bundles from local storage.
Add patch bundles from URL. Patch bundles can automatically update.
The installation failed due to an unknown reason. Try again?
The installation was cancelled manually. Try again?
The installation was blocked. Review your device security settings and try again.
Android reported an installation conflict. Review the error details and try another installer if needed.
The installed app is signed differently. Uninstall the installed app and install this one?
The app is incompatible with this device. Use an APK that is compatible by this device and try again.
The app is invalid. Uninstall the app and try again?
The app could not be installed due to insufficient storage. Free up some space and try again.
The installation took too long. Try again?
Automatically update when a new version is available
Browse external patch bundles and add them to the URV Manager.
This bundle is using API V3. It will not be usable in the app and the patches list will always be empty.
This repository is archived. Updates may be discontinued.
Added patch bundle import to queue.
No patches found for this bundle.
These patches are not compatible with the selected app version (%1$s).\n\nClick on the patches to see more details.
Show a popup notification whenever a new update is available on launch
View current keystore details and file status
